Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6000 "TRAFFIC-6000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Traffic.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Modified the CPX $DD07 instruction at $6073 to JMP $4700 to skip the message about plugging the joystick into port 1.
Note: the game should be dumped on the 2nd hit at $6000.
